summary: ANDROID 🟥 CLOUD Unable to remove policies for VFRee 60 + device
scenario: VFree 60+ device not appearing in Manage > Policies > Individual Device list, preventing policy setting and removal
description_clean: When logging into a tenant, the VFree 60+ device is not shown in Manage -> Policies -> Individual Device list, preventing users from setting or removing policies for that device. The device appears in the inventory, and users can access settings there, but can only set policies (not remove them). Expected behavior: VFree 60+ should appear in the Individual Device list under Policies, allowing both setting and removal of policies.
steps: Navigate to Manage -> Policies -> Individual Device list
Check if VFree 60+ device is listed
If not listed, go to Inventory to verify the device exists
Attempt to set a policy for the device from Inventory
Attempt to remove a policy for the device from Inventory
expected: VFree 60+ should appear in the Individual Device list under Policies, allowing both setting and removal of policies.
actual: VFree 60+ device is not shown in Manage -> Policies -> Individual Device list. The device appears in the inventory, and users can access settings there, but can only set policies (not remove them).
